component.name: ZCode
component.summary: Simple, fast, vibe-ready — the official harness for GLM-5.2
简单、迅捷、氛围十足 — GLM-5.2 官方适配开发工具

description.p: ZCode is an AI coding harness from Z.ai, built around the GLM-5.2 model family. It combines powerful AI agents with your existing toolchain so you can plan, code, review and ship without leaving your flow.
This is an unofficial Flatpak packaging of ZCode for Linux. The upstream application binary is provided as-is by Z.ai; this repository only wraps it for installation under Flatpak.

ul.li: Added scheduled tasks, which can automatically execute tasks according to the set schedule
Scheduled tasks support immediate execution and history viewing
Support custom recurrence rules and due dates
Scheduled tasks support configurable model, mode and reasoning intensity
Scheduled task cards can be created and viewed directly in chat
Supports auxiliary conversation, allowing you to continue asking questions on the secondary display
Support selecting text to quickly add it to the context
Smoother experience for scrolling long conversations and jumping back to the bottom
Supports displaying attachments and tool results in chat
Added codebase Wiki generation and language selection
Revamped the plugin store, with support for search and detail pages
Plugins support remote synchronization and CDN installation
Supports synchronous operations for remote workspaces and WSL
Windows: Minimize to system tray by default
The update window is now displayed independently with product branding shown
Support for Kimi K3
Added non-project conversation mode
The task sections in the sidebar are now collapsible and sortable
Markdown tables support horizontal scrolling and expanded viewing
Feishu bot supports streaming card replies
Fixed issues with mobile input, zooming, and message operations
Fixed the scrolling direction and jitter issues of Markdown tables
Fixed exceptions in plugin installation, uninstallation and remote sync
Fixed issues with remote workspace startup and plugin refresh
Fixed the recovery issue after OAuth credentials are corrupted
Fixed abnormal status issues with automatic update download, cancellation and installation
Fixed the interaction issues of title bar and settings window on Linux and Windows
Fixed issues with feedback submission timeout and duplicate tickets
Deleted tasks now stay hidden after restarting the app.
Resumed sessions now correctly preserve previous thoughts and legacy SSH task history.
Terminal tabs now close correctly when the shell exits, with accurate tab naming.
Custom slash commands are now properly saved and restored in message drafts.
Windows caption menus no longer overlap with window controls.
Output token budgets now align correctly with auto-compact settings.
Fixed an issue where the system prompt was lost mid-conversation, improving multi-turn conversation stability.
When pasting tables, plain text format is now preferred to avoid formatting issues.
Fixed an issue where historical preview images would occasionally disappear after sending an image.
Refined UI details, including fixes for missing code comment display and misaligned interface elements.
Optimize the Wiki generation capability of the codebase while supporting multiple languages.
Markdown tables now support better horizontal scrolling.
Fixed the exception caused by the workspace being unavailable at startup.
Fixed the residual issue after plugin installation and synchronization failure.
Fixed the issue where recovery was not possible when login authorization encountered an exception.
Fixed the issue where unclear prompts or selection loss occurred when the model was unavailable.
Fixed the issue where custom models were not retained after a restart.
Fixed abnormal quick operations such as chat search and history switching.
Fixed the issue where the file tree fails to refresh or displays incorrect status.
Fixed the scrolling direction and boundary issues of Markdown tables.
Fixed the issue where the timing and control buttons for background tasks were missing.
Fixed an issue where the SQL diff preview might crash.
Fixed the display issue of icons and title bar on Linux.
Fixed the issue where unread markers would be lost after a restart.
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
Improved plan mode exit so it returns to the previously selected permission mode.
Fixed occasional freezes or duplicate prompts in search and interaction requests.
Fixed inconsistent wording in task notifications.
Fixed the sidebar upgrade flow not returning to the original workspace after closing.
Fixed chat briefly continuing to show loading after a goal completes.
Fixed terminal input sometimes duplicating spaces.
Fixed some remote capabilities not taking effect promptly after app updates.
